mnemonics: Cats Love To Sleep Always Keeping Friends
keyPoints: Separated sets: Can be split into two disjoint non-empty sets.
Disconnected sets: Cannot be split into two disjoint non-empty sets.
Connected sets: Can be joined together without a gap.
Components: The largest connected subset of a space.
Connected subsets of R: Connected subsets of the real line.
Continuous functions on connected sets: Functions that can be drawn without lifting the pen.
